name: TP53 300kb TAD (ENCODE K562 CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 300kb window spanning the TP53 TAD on chr17p13.1. CTCF sites from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF736NYC, ENCSR000DWE, IDR narrowPeak, GRCh38). H3K27ac enhancer peaks from ENCODE K562 (ENCFF864OSZ, ENCSR000AKP). TAD boundaries from Rao et al. 2014 K562 Arrowhead domains (GSE63525, hg19 lifted to hg38 with +96,701bp offset — approximate). TP53 is on the MINUS strand; TSS is at the 3' end of the gene coordinates. CTCF site at TP53/WRAP53 bidirectional promoter validated by Soto-Reyes & Recillas-Targa 2010 (PMID:20101205) and Saldana-Meyer et al. 2014 (PMID:24681887). TP53 has two promoters: P1 upstream of exon 1 and P2 internal in intron 4 (delta133p53 isoforms).

enhancers.name: TP53_P1_promoter_TSS
enhancers.note: TP53 transcription start site for P1 promoter (NM_000546.6, minus strand so TSS is at txEnd=7687490). CDS: 7669608-7676594. Confirmed by ENCODE H3K27ac peak (ENCFF864OSZ signal=70.08) and CTCF peak (ENCFF736NYC signal=132.79)

enhancers.name: TP53_P2_internal_promoter
enhancers.note: Internal promoter P2 at intron 4/exon 5 junction, drives delta133p53 isoforms. Approximate position based on exon 4 (7673700-7673837) and exon 5 (7674180-7674290). Marcel et al. 2010 (PMID:20190805)

enhancers.name: MPDU1_SOX15_enhancer_cluster
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac peak (signal=85.29) spanning 4.9kb (7582057-7586946). Largest H3K27ac peak in the 5-prime portion of the window. Located ~84kb upstream of TP53 TSS. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy from signal ratio

enhancers.name: EIF4A1_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak at EIF4A1 promoter (signal=38.63). Located ~114kb upstream of TP53 TSS

enhancers.name: CD68_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak at CD68 promoter (signal=23.46, 7578968-7581532). Located ~107kb upstream of TP53 TSS

enhancers.name: ATP1B2_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak H3K27ac peak at ATP1B2 (signal=12.10). Located ~37kb upstream of TP53 TSS

enhancers.name: TP53_WRAP53_bidirectional_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Major H3K27ac peak (signal=70.08) spanning TP53 promoter and WRAP53 overlap region (7684755-7688135, 3.4kb wide). Bidirectional promoter activity confirmed by Saldana-Meyer et al. 2014 (PMID:24681887)

enhancers.name: KDM6B_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac peak at KDM6B/JMJD3 promoter (signal=42.97, 7838447-7839768). Located ~152kb downstream of TP53 TSS

enhancers.name: KDM6B_5prime_enhancer_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Broad H3K27ac peak in KDM6B 5-prime region (signal=45.47, 7841021-7845712, 4.7kb wide)

ctcf_sites.name: SENP3_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF near SENP3 promoter (7560494-7560600). Near 5-prime TAD boundary

ctcf_sites.name: SENP3_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: Strongest 5-prime CTCF in window (7561043-7561245). Co-localizes with H3K27ac peak. Candidate 5-prime TAD boundary element

ctcf_sites.name: SOX15_FXR2_insulator
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF between SOX15 and FXR2 (7586828-7586970). Within H3K27ac super-enhancer candidate region

ctcf_sites.name: SHBG_FXR2_boundary
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF at SHBG/FXR2 gene boundary (7614957-7615035)

ctcf_sites.name: TP53_intron3_4_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF within TP53 gene body, intron 3-4 region (7673290-7673560). Near P2 internal promoter. Soto-Reyes & Recillas-Targa 2010 (PMID:20101205) identified CTCF binding in TP53 promoter region

ctcf_sites.name: TP53_WRAP53_bidirectional_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: STRONGEST CTCF in TP53 vicinity (7688098-7688269). At TP53/WRAP53 bidirectional promoter. CTCF regulates p53 through interaction with Wrap53 antisense RNA (Saldana-Meyer et al. 2014, PMID:24681887). Co-localizes with strongest H3K27ac peak in TP53 region

ctcf_sites.name: EFNB3_downstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF just downstream of EFNB3 (7711439-7711709)

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF at DNAH2 promoter (7717265-7717535). Near potential intra-TAD boundary

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_internal_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF within DNAH2 gene body (7743658-7743812)

ctcf_sites.name: KDM6B_upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF upstream of KDM6B (7834924-7835086). Candidate 3-prime TAD boundary element. Co-localizes with H3K27ac

tad_boundaries.name: TP53_primary_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Primary TAD containing TP53 (160kb). hg19: 7470000-7630000 lifted to hg38 with +96701bp offset (APPROXIMATE). Contains TP53, WRAP53, EFNB3, parts of ATP1B2 and DNAH2. Rao et al. 2014 Cell (PMID:25497547)

tad_boundaries.name: downstream_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Downstream TAD (350kb). hg19: 7620000-7970000. Contains bulk of DNAH2 and KDM6B. Boundary overlaps with TP53 TAD by ~10kb

tp53_exons._note: TP53 canonical transcript NM_000546.6, minus strand. 11 exons. CDS: 7669608-7676594

studies.finding: CTCF binds TP53 promoter, maintains open chromatin, protects against repressive histone marks
CTCF regulates p53 through direct interaction with Wrap53 antisense RNA via RNA-binding region

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 300x300 matrix. Requires empirical calibration after first TP53 ARCHCODE run. SSIM thresholds from HBB 30kb config will be diluted at this resolution.
